content.text:
Done. Added `GET /users/:id` to `src/server.ts:15`.

It matches URLs starting with `/users/`, extracts the id, and returns the user as JSON with a 200 if found. If no user matches, it falls through to the existing 404 not-found response. Everything else is unchanged.
